title: Checkout total incorrect when percentage discount applied
description: When a 10% discount coupon is applied at POS checkout, the total displays the pre-discount amount. Customer is charged full price despite valid coupon scan. Expected: discounted total. Actual: original total displayed.
code_snippet: def apply_discount(total, discount): return total - discount

title: Self-checkout loyalty points not applied on split payment
description: When a customer pays using a split payment method (part cash, part card) at self-checkout, loyalty points are calculated only on the card portion. Points should be calculated on the full transaction total regardless of payment method.
code_snippet: def calculate_points(card_amount, rate=1): return int(card_amount * rate)

title: Refund transaction posts negative tax amount incorrectly
description: When a refund is processed at the POS terminal, the tax amount is posted as a negative value twice — once on the refund line and once on the tax summary. This causes the end-of-day tax report to show incorrect totals.
